posting.sourceTitle: Finishing Trades Institute of New York
posting.sponsorName: Finishing Trades Institute of New York
posting.locationSummary: New York City and Long Island regions
posting.applicationSummary: Pick up applications in person only at the Finishing Trades Institute of New York during the recruitment period. Attendance at a mandatory orientation is required, and only 500 applications will be issued on a first-come, first-served basis.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: Finishing Trades Institute of New York, 45-15 36th Street, Long Island City, NY 11101
posting.applicationHours: 9:00 a.m. to 3:00 p.m., Monday through Friday, during the recruitment period
posting.applicationLimitDetails: Limited-application recruitment. Only 500 applications will be distributed on a first-come, first-served basis. Recruitment will continue through the posting period or until 500 applications have been issued, whichever comes first.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma, such as TASC or GED. Proof is required at the time of enrollment in apprenticeship.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must take and pass a drug test after selection and randomly throughout the apprenticeship. The sponsor pays the cost of the drug test.
posting.classRequirement: Must attend a mandatory orientation that includes a site evaluation and completing a personal statement provided during orientation.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old.
Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED. Proof will be required at the time of enrollment in apprenticeship.
Must attend a mandatory orientation, which includes a site evaluation and completing a personal statement provided during orientation.

Must sign an affidavit attesting that they are physically able to perform the work of a Metal Refinisher, including lifting and carrying material and equipment up to 70 pounds and working from ladders, scaffolds, lifts, and suspended scaffolds.
Must be able to read, hear, and understand instructions and warnings in English.
Must take and pass a drug test, at the expense of the sponsor, after selection and randomly throughout the apprenticeship.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 18, have a high school diploma or equivalency, attend a mandatory orientation, be able to perform the physical work and understand English instructions, and pass drug testing.
posting.contactName: Finishing Trades Institute of New York
posting.contactSummary: For further information, contact the Finishing Trades Institute of New York at (718) 937-7440.
